rationale: 1-D Sierpinski analog with index-1 primes only — calibration benchmark to validate the index-1 + native_decide pipeline. Sierpinski numbers and 1-D coverings are classical; the project's contribution here is formalization rather than new math. Not a real closure candidate. Useful as a pipeline smoke test before the harder 2-D grid attempt (slot743). No real_closure_candidate -> bare lane.
